response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack capabilities with the required TypeScript/Node.js stack and relevant experience in AI agent infrastructure. While their secondary stack includes Dlang and C/C++, their core competencies align well with the role's primary responsibilities. Leadership in open-source projects and contributions to scalable systems further support their suitability.
